cookieConsent.message: We use cookies for login and to improve the site.

inviteWarning.base: Invitation created but the email could not be sent.
inviteWarning.envDisabled: Invitation created. Email sending is disabled — share the invitation link below.
inviteWarning.missingApiKey: RESEND_API_KEY is missing. Add it to your .env (see .env.example).
inviteWarning.sandbox: Invitation created but the email could not be sent. In test mode (onboarding@resend.dev) Resend can only send to the email on your Resend account. Try that address locally, or verify your own domain in Resend. More info: {docsUrl}
inviteWarning.apiKey: Invitation created but the email could not be sent. The Resend API key is invalid or not allowed. Check RESEND_API_KEY in .env.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Pantry · dates · shopping
login.metaDescription: Log in to Skaffu — pantry app for fridge, freezer and shopping. Reduce food waste with smart inventory and expiry tracking.
login.rateLimit: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Your household, one app
register.metaDescription: Create a free Skaffu account. Pantry app with scanning and receipt PDF — track your household inventory and reduce food waste.
register.captchaLabel: Confirm you are not a robot
register.captchaLoadError: Captcha could not load. Refresh the page and try again.
register.captchaDomainError: Captcha could not load for this website address. Try opening the app via the official website URL or contact support.
register.rateLimited: Too many registration attempts. Wait a moment and try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We will email you a reset link
forgotPassword.lead: Enter the email for your account. If it exists, you will receive a link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Choose new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.metaDescription: Set a new password for your Skaffu account.

verifyEmail.title: Confirm your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a link to your inbox
verifyEmail.lead: Open the email and click the link to activate your account. Check spam if you do not see it.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: If your account is pending confirmation, we sent a new email.
verifyEmail.legacyNotice: Existing account? We recently added email confirmation. Use the button below to get a new link if you never received one.
verifyEmail.invalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.metaDescription: Confirm your email address to use Skaffu.
verifyEmail.welcomeBody: Confirm your email to start using your pantry.

receiptGuide.title: Do you have the receipt digitally?
receiptGuide.intro: Many apps store receipts — export as PDF or image and upload here.
receiptGuide.step1: Open the app where the receipt is (e.g. Kivra, bank, email, Wallet)
receiptGuide.step2: Open the receipt → Save, Share or Download as PDF or image
receiptGuide.step3: Come back here and choose Select from files
receiptGuide.examplesAria: Examples of apps with digital receipts
receiptGuide.kivraStep1: Open Kivra and find the receipt under purchases or documents.
receiptGuide.kivraStep2: Tap the receipt and choose share or save — often as PDF.
receiptGuide.kivraStep3: Save the PDF and choose the file here — no need to convert it to a screenshot.

hubHero.subtitle: Photograph fridge, freezer, or pantry — many items at once.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage account, household and app preferences

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the app.
language.label: Language

kivraForward.title: Forward Kivra receipts
kivraForward.description: Get digital receipts straight into inventory — beta
kivraForward.lead: Forward your Kivra receipt (PDF) to the address below and we'll fill your pantry automatically.
kivraForward.step1: Open the receipt in Kivra and choose forward or share via email.
kivraForward.step2: Paste your personal address as the recipient.
kivraForward.step3: We parse the PDF and add items to inventory — you'll get a notification in the app.
kivraForward.hint: Works best with PDF from Kivra or ICA. Couldn't read the receipt? Upload the PDF manually under Scan.
kivraForward.beta: Beta — enabled for selected households. We don't keep the full email after import.

pets.title: Pets
pets.note: Enable to show Pets in the menu and manage your pets.
pets.heading: Your pets

onboarding.title: Show introduction again
onboarding.note: Walk through the welcome guide for the app.

installApp.title: Add to home screen
installApp.note: Install the app as a shortcut on iPhone or Android.

expiryReminders.title: Expiring item reminders
expiryReminders.note: Weekly email with items expiring soon in your households. Opt-in only.

autoExpiredGrace.title: Auto-expired items
autoExpiredGrace.note: Items move to a separate tab after the best-before date plus a grace period. Nothing is deleted automatically.
autoExpiredGrace.timeline: Best before → +{days} days grace → review in pantry → you clear

pushNotifications.title: Browser notifications
pushNotifications.note: Weekly browser notification when items expire soon. Requires HTTPS and permission.
pushNotifications.unsupported: Browser notifications need the installed app (PWA) or production — not plain dev server.

errors.unsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
errors.serviceWorkerUnavailable: Install the app to your home screen or use production (service worker missing). Try /install-app or skaffu.com.
errors.denied: Notifications were blocked. Allow notifications in your browser settings.
errors.notConfigured: Push notifications are not configured on the server yet.
errors.failed: Could not update notifications. Try again.

shoppingPush.title: Shop today
shoppingPush.note: Daily morning notification when unchecked items remain on your shopping list. Requires browser notifications above.

shoppingToPantry.title: Check-off → pantry
shoppingToPantry.note: Choose whether checked shopping rows are added to inventory.
shoppingToPantry.modeLabel: When checking off the shopping list

plan.title: Plan

plan.celebrationBody: Unlimited AI, receipt PDF, smart fill, and more household members are unlocked.

feedback.title: Give feedback
feedback.description: Tell us what's working well or what we could do better — a few words is enough.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: e.g. scan felt smooth, wish there was a filter in the list…
feedback.messageTooShort: Please write at least a few words.

feedback.messagePlaceholder: e.g. forget the app, too much effort to scan, use Bring instead…

postOnboarding.title: How does it feel so far?

pmfSurvey.missQuestion: Would you miss Skaffu if it disappeared?

page.title: Add to home screen
page.subtitle: Quick shortcut to your pantry — like an app, without the App Store.

guide.title: Install Skaffu
guide.lead: Add a home screen shortcut to open your pantry in one tap — camera and offline work better in the installed view.
guide.alreadyInstalled: You are already using the installed app. Nice!
guide.iosStep1: Open {hostname} in Safari (not an in-app browser from other apps).
guide.iosStep2: Tap the Share button (square with arrow up).
guide.iosStep3: Choose Add to Home Screen and confirm.
guide.iosHint: On iPad: same steps in Safari.
guide.androidStep2: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top right.
guide.androidStep3: Choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
guide.androidHint: If you do not see Install app, use Add to Home screen in the menu.
guide.desktopNote: On desktop, use the app in your browser. Mobile with a home screen icon works best.

install.accepted: Install started — follow your browser’s dialog.
install.dismissed: Install cancelled. You can follow the steps below instead.

banner.aria: Tip: install Skaffu on your home screen
banner.title: Install Skaffu on your home screen
banner.body: Get faster access to your pantry — scan, plan meals and expiry alerts straight from the icon.

inventory.title: Your pantry
inventory.subtitle: Scan items when you shop — keep track of what you have.
inventory.emptyCanWrite: Scan an item or add manually in {location}.

inventory.emptyReadonly: There are no items in {location} yet.
inventory.readonly: You have read-only access in this household.
inventory.autoExpiredSectionLead: Nothing is deleted — review here and mark as used or clear when you're sure.

inventory.bulkExpiryBanner: Add best-before dates to undated items with AI in one tap.
inventory.sortColumnAsc: Sorted by {column}, ascending. Activate to sort descending.
inventory.sortColumnDesc: Sorted by {column}, descending. Activate to sort ascending.

stats.title: Your pantry in numbers
stats.subtitle: Overview, trends, and how you reduce food waste
stats.noConsumptionYet: Mark items as finished when you use them
stats.empty: Nothing logged yet — start on the home screen and stats will fill in.
stats.emptyDescription: Scan or photograph your pantry to get a clear picture of stock and expiring items.

stats.eatFirstLead: See expiring items and meal suggestions on the home screen.

wrapped.slideIntroFirstBody: Welcome — your story grows as you log what you consume.
wrapped.slideSavingsBodyMonth: By using food before it expired this month.
wrapped.slideSavingsBodyLifetime: This is how much you have saved in total by using food in time.

wrapped.slideMilestonesBody: Small wins along the way in your pantry.

emailSending.title: Email sending
emailSending.note: Controls all outbound email (household invites, expiry reminders). Off by default until a verified domain is in place.
emailSending.envDisabled: EMAIL_SENDING_DISABLED is set in environment variables — sending stays blocked until removed, even when the toggle is on.

feedback.title: User feedback
feedback.note: Churn signals from settings and a short post-onboarding survey. Complements interviews — see docs/USER_INTERVIEWS.md.

pmfSurvey.note: NPS and “would you miss Skaffu” from the in-app banner. Export for interview prep.

waitlist.title: Pro interest (waitlist)
waitlist.note: Emails from /priser and Settings. Stripe gate: ≥50 per docs/PRICING.md §6.

aiUsage.title: AI usage
aiUsage.note: Aggregated from rate-limit counters. No household IDs or user data — counts only.
aiUsage.budgetEstimate: Estimated spend {month}: ~{spend} USD of {budget} USD (from AI call counts).
aiUsage.budgetExceeded: Monthly cap reached — new AI calls are blocked until next month.
aiUsage.rateLimitsNote: Per household via AiRateLimitService — complements aggregated usage above.
aiUsage.topHouseholdsNote: Ranked by total AI calls. Household identity is not shown.

launchCohort.title: Launch cohort

decisions.cohortGated: Not enough data yet ({eligible}/{min} D30-eligible users). Check back after more signups.
decisions.usageNote: Top product events and weekly totals from product_event.
decisions.stuckNote: Click heatmaps on key flows — inventory, weekly plan, and recipe.

summary.allOnTarget: All tracked metrics meet or exceed target — good week.

activation.label: Activation
activation.definition: ≥10 items or 1 receipt within 24 h of signup

firstScan.label: Time to first scan
firstScan.definition: Median minutes from signup to first barcode/receipt scan

weeklyScan.label: Weekly scan rate
weeklyScan.definition: Share of weekly active users who scanned something in the last 7 days

d7.label: D7 retention
d7.definition: Share who returned at least 7 days after signup

d30.label: D30 retention
d30.definition: Share who returned at least 30 days after signup

multiMember.label: Households 2+ active
multiMember.definition: Share of active households with at least two active members (7 days)

smartFill.label: Smart fill / list
smartFill.definition: Share of weekly active users who added AI suggestions to the shopping list

weeklyRitual.label: Weekly ritual rate
weeklyRitual.definition: Share of weekly active users who approved their week plan (weekly_ritual_approved)

wrapped.label: Wrapped rate
wrapped.definition: Share of monthly active users who viewed Wrapped in the last 30 days

receipt.label: Receipt rate
receipt.definition: Share of activated users who have parsed at least one receipt

invite.label: Invite rate
invite.definition: Share of households created in the last 7 days with at least two members

starter.hint: You can always scan instead via

photoRound.title: Add with photos
photoRound.subtitle: Photograph fridge, freezer or cupboard — review and save
photoRound.zoneLead: Pick where to inventory. Take 1–3 photos per zone.
photoRound.captureLeadGeneric: Take 1–3 photos — AI suggests location when analyzing
photoRound.zoneUncertain: AI is unsure about the location ({zone}). Check location per item before saving.
photoRound.privacyNote: Photos are analyzed by AI and are not stored permanently in Skaffu.
photoRound.parseFailed: Could not read items from the photos. Try clearer images.
photoRound.uploadTooLarge: Photos are too large together (max 18 MB). Remove a photo or use smaller images.
photoRound.serverError: The server could not analyze the photos. Try again in a moment.
photoRound.noItems: No visible items found. Try more angles or better lighting.
photoRound.reviewHint: Remove wrong rows and adjust name, quantity and location before saving.
photoRound.sameAsLastTime: Use same location as last time

photoScan.title: Photograph product
photoScan.subtitle: AI reads the label and fills in details
photoScan.readFailed: Could not read the product from the image. Try a clearer photo.
photoScan.networkError: Network error while analysing the image.
photoScan.filledFromPhoto: Filled in details from the photo (confidence: {confidence}). Check before saving.
photoScan.pickHint: Take a clear photo of the product label and we'll fill in name, quantity, unit and best-before when visible.

receipt.readingStatus: Reading receipt… this usually takes a few seconds.
receipt.parseFailed: Oops — could not read the receipt. Try a clearer file or another angle.
receipt.networkError: Oops — network error. Check your connection and try again.

formats.hint: Supported: PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC — e.g. Kivra PDF or a photo of a paper receipt.
formats.unsupported: That file type won't work here. Choose a PDF or image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC).
formats.tooLarge: The file is too large (max 8 MB). Try a smaller PDF or photo.
formats.processingFailed: Could not prepare the image. Try another file or photograph the receipt.

receiptBulk.lead: Have the receipt in an app? Upload the PDF or image directly — or photograph a paper receipt. We suggest items you can add.
receiptBulk.locationBulkHint: Applies to checked rows. Change a row below if it should go somewhere else.

scanFlow.lookupFailed: Oops — could not look up the barcode. Try again or enter manually.
scanFlow.networkError: Oops — network error. Check your connection and try again.
scanFlow.noCamera: No camera found on this device.
scanFlow.cameraDenied: Could not open the camera. Allow camera access in your browser settings.
scanFlow.cameraUnavailable: The camera is busy or unavailable. Try again or add the item manually.
scanFlow.toastAdded: Done! "{label}" is now in your pantry.
scanFlow.toastAddedUnknown: Nice — "{label}" is in your pantry (unknown barcode).
scanFlow.invalidBarcodeManual: Oops — enter a valid barcode (at least 8 digits).
scanFlow.productNotFoundBanner: Product not found in database. Check the name before saving.
scanFlow.scannerHint: Point the camera at the product barcode.

recipe.title: Recipe suggestions
recipe.notLoggedIn: You must be logged in to generate recipes.
recipe.serviceUnavailable: AI service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
recipe.generateFailed: Oops — could not generate recipes right now. Try again.
recipe.noneGenerated: No recipes were generated. Add more items and try again.
recipe.reachFailed: Could not reach the AI service right now. Try again in a moment.
recipe.parseFailed: Could not parse recipe suggestions. Try again in a moment.
recipe.parseFromAi: Could not parse recipe suggestions from AI. Try again in a moment.
recipe.noInventoryNote: No items in stock yet. Add items first, then you can generate recipes.
recipe.networkError: Network error while generating recipes. Check your connection and try again.
recipe.intro: Meal ideas from what you can actually cook — not pet food, flowers, or cleaning supplies. Pick a style below and add preferences if you like.
recipe.noSuitableInventoryNote: Nothing in your stock looks suitable for cooking (e.g. only cleaning or pet food). Add groceries and try again.
recipe.portionsHint: All recipes are scaled to this many servings.
recipe.addAllMissingBtn: Add all missing to shopping list ({count})
recipe.addMissingSuccess: {count} {count, plural, one {item added} other {items added}} to the shopping list.
recipe.addMissingPartial: Added {added}, {skipped} were already on the list.
recipe.addMissingNone: All missing items were already on the shopping list.
recipe.addMissingFailed: Could not add to the shopping list. Try again.
recipe.label: Recipe ideas
recipe.firstWinToast: Woohoo — your first recipe ideas are here! Cooking just got easier.
recipe.addToWeekFailed: Could not add to the week. Try again.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Skaffu helps you keep track of food at home — so you shop smarter, waste less, and cook from what you already have.
onboarding.welcomeBodyShort: Photo, scan, or receipt — value in seconds.
onboarding.quickPointsAria: What you can do right away
onboarding.quickPointScan: Add with photos — or scan barcodes and receipts
onboarding.quickPointExpiry: See what expires soon on the home screen
onboarding.quickPointMeals: Plan meals and shopping when you are ready
onboarding.scanBody: Photograph fridge, freezer or cupboard — or scan barcodes and receipts. Five items is enough to get started — you do not need the whole pantry at once.
onboarding.scanHint: Tip: tap the Scan tab at the bottom whenever you want to add more items.
onboarding.scanTabHint: You can always use the Scan tab at the bottom — photo, barcode, and receipt.
onboarding.expiryBody: Set expiry dates when you add items. On the home screen we show what expires soon and suggest meals so you use food in time.
onboarding.mealsBody: Plan the week's dinners and fill the shopping list with what's missing — the list stays connected to what you have at home.
onboarding.readyBody: Choose how you want to fill your pantry first.
onboarding.addItemsBody: Photograph fridge, freezer or cupboard — or scan a barcode or receipt. One item is enough to get started!
onboarding.addItemsBodyBinary: Pick one path — receipt or three barcodes. Under three minutes to a stocked pantry.
onboarding.celebrateReceiptBody: You have {count} items in your pantry — great start!
onboarding.celebrateStartedBody: You've started — your pantry is taking shape!
onboarding.scanModalTitle: How do you want to add?
onboarding.scanModalBody: Pick what works best for you. The guide stays open while you scan.
onboarding.encourageStep4: You will stay on top of dates — smart!
onboarding.encourageStep5: Almost ready for a really great food experience!
onboarding.celebrateWoohoo: You're up and running with the app — woohoo!
onboarding.locationsBody: Split your stock by where items are stored. Tap a location on the home screen to view and edit contents.
onboarding.shareBody: Invite family or housemates under Settings. Switch between households via the menu at the top if you have several pantries.

hem.title: Your home screen
hem.body: See expiring items, shortcuts to fridge, freezer and cupboard — plus smart suggestions for the week.

inventory.title: Your inventory
inventory.body: Everything you add lands here, sorted by location. Tap an item to edit or mark as used.

inkop.title: Shopping list
inkop.body: Add what's missing at home. The list stays connected to your pantry so you don't double-buy.

planer.title: Meal plan
planer.body: Plan the week's dinners from what you have at home — and fill the list with what's missing.

statistik.title: Your stats
statistik.body: Track waste, streaks and how well you use food in time.

gamification.placeholder: Mark items as finished when you use them — your impact shows up here.
gamification.celebrateFirstConsumption: First item marked as used — a solid start against food waste.
gamification.celebrateZeroWasteStreak: {count} zero-waste weeks in a row — keep the rhythm going.
gamification.celebrateEatFirstRitual: Eat-first meal on the plan — you're turning expiring items into dinner.
gamification.celebrateWeeklyRitualFirst: First week approved — your Monday ritual is underway.
gamification.celebrateSavings500: You've saved about {sek} SEK by using food in time.
gamification.celebrateSyncWeek: You kept the pantry alive this week — nice work.
gamification.nextMilestoneStreakHint: One more zero-waste week for the streak badge
gamification.progressHubLead: Milestones, streak, and savings — shared pride for the household.

eatFirst.title: Eat it first
eatFirst.subtitle: Use expiring items before they go to waste — get meal ideas from your pantry.
eatFirst.noExpiring: Nothing urgent right now — great job staying on top of dates.
eatFirst.generateFailed: Could not generate suggestions. Try again.
eatFirst.noneGenerated: No suggestions right now — add a few more items or try again later.
eatFirst.scheduleFailed: Could not add to the meal plan. Try again.
eatFirst.shareFailed: Could not create share link. Try again.
eatFirst.shareEmpty: No expiring items to share right now.

weeklyRitual.pageSubtitle: Expiring items → AI meals → one click to plan and shopping list
weeklyRitual.heroSubtitleDefault: Plan the week's dinners from your pantry — one click to meal plan and shopping list.
weeklyRitual.heroSubtitleExpiring: {count} items expiring soon — plan the week before they become waste.
weeklyRitual.heroSubtitleSyncDefault: Photo round or confirm uncertain items — good enough accuracy in no time.
weeklyRitual.heroSubtitleStale: {count} items maybe gone — confirm or mark finished.
weeklyRitual.heroSubtitleSyncHub: Photo round or confirm what's still in stock — then optionally plan the week.
weeklyRitual.heroSubtitleSyncHubEmpty: Photo round or plan the week — nothing to confirm right now.
weeklyRitual.flowLead: Generate up to five dinner ideas, adjust the days, and approve the whole week.
weeklyRitual.noExpiring: Nothing urgent right now — you can still plan the week from your pantry.
weeklyRitual.generateFailed: Could not create suggestions. Try again.
weeklyRitual.networkError: Could not reach the AI service. Check your connection and try again.
weeklyRitual.noneGenerated: No suggestions right now — add more items or try again later.
weeklyRitual.approveSuccess: {count} meals scheduled. {listAdded} items added to the shopping list.
weeklyRitual.approveFailed: Could not approve the week. Try again.
weeklyRitual.nextStepLead: {count, plural, =0 {Open the shopping list for what you still need.} one {One item was added — shop when it suits you.} other {{count} items were added — shop when it suits you.}}
weeklyRitual.inboundPushLead: {count} items expiring — here are this week's suggestions. Generate and approve in one click.
weeklyRitual.inboundEmailLead: {count} items expiring soon — open week suggestions and add them to your plan and shopping list.
weeklyRitual.readonlyHint: You have read-only access — ask an admin to plan the week.
weeklyRitual.savingsFootnote: Estimated {sek} kr · {kg} kg saved so far by using food in time.

skafferapport.title: Pantry report
skafferapport.lead: Estimate based on items you marked as consumed — not wasted.

banner.body: You are signed in to the demo account. Data is reset on a schedule — ideal for showing Skaffu without touching real households.

expiring.title: Expiring soon
expiring.subtitle: Within {days} days
expiring.empty: Nothing expires in the next {days} days — nice work!

pushNotifications.expiryBody: {count} items expiring — here are this week's suggestions
pushNotifications.movingSoonBody: {name} — {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} left. Still good?

ai.loadingWeekly: Planning the week from your pantry…

householdInvite.promptBody: A shared list and pantry makes it easier to stay in sync — invite a partner or family member.

captcha.failed: Captcha was not verified. Try again.
captcha.notConfigured: Captcha is not configured. Contact the administrator.

shoppingItem.title: Remove row?
shoppingItem.description: Row {name} will be removed from the shopping list.

clearChecked.title: Clear checked?
clearChecked.description: {count} checked {count, plural, one {row will} other {rows will}} be permanently removed.
clearChecked.descriptionAll: All checked rows will be permanently removed.

inventoryItem.title: Delete item?
inventoryItem.description: Item {name} will be removed from the pantry.

inventoryItemFinished.title: Mark as finished?
inventoryItemFinished.description: Item {name} will be removed from the active list but can be shown under "Show finished".

inventoryAutoExpiredBulk.title: Clear auto-expired items?
inventoryAutoExpiredBulk.description: {count} expired {count, plural, one {item will} other {items will}} be removed and logged as waste.
inventoryAutoExpiredBulk.consequence: Review the list first if anything is still usable.

householdMember.title: Remove member?
householdMember.description: Member {name} will lose access to the household.
householdMember.consequence: They must be invited again to return.

household.title: Delete household
household.description: This cannot be undone. All inventory, shopping list and consumption history for the household will be deleted.
household.otherMembers: {count} {count, plural, one {other member} other {other members}} will lose access immediately.
household.typedHintGeneric: Type the household name or DELETE to confirm.

invite.title: Revoke invitation?
invite.description: Invitation to {name} will be removed. The link will stop working.
invite.descriptionGeneric: The invitation will be removed and the link will stop working.

pet.title: Delete pet?
pet.description: Pet {name} and related food logs will be deleted.

petFood.title: Delete food?
petFood.description: Food entry {name} will be removed from pet supplies.

plannedMeal.title: Delete meal?
plannedMeal.description: Meal {name} will be removed from the weekly plan.

receiptReview.title: Discard review?
receiptReview.description: {count} identified {count, plural, one {item will disappear} other {items will disappear}} if you choose a new image.
receiptReview.descriptionEmpty: The parsed receipt list will be lost if you choose a new image.
receiptReview.consequence: You will need to photograph or select the receipt again.

photoRoundReview.title: Cancel photo scan?
photoRoundReview.description: {count} {count, plural, one {item will be lost} other {items will be lost}} from the review list.
photoRoundReview.descriptionEmpty: The review list will be cleared.
photoRoundReview.consequence: You will need to photograph the zone again.

generic.title: Delete?
generic.descriptionSimple: Are you sure you want to delete this?
generic.descriptionPermanent: The selected entry will be permanently deleted.

billing.notConfigured: Billing is not configured on the server yet.
billing.ownerRequired: Only the household owner can upgrade to Pro.
billing.portalUnavailable: No Stripe customer for this household. Use complimentary Pro or complete checkout first.

plan.inventoryLimit: You've reached the maximum pantry items on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro or remove items.
plan.membersLimit: The Free plan allows up to two household members. Upgrade to Pro for more.

household.forbidden: Only owners can perform this action.
household.deleteConfirm: Confirmation does not match. Type the household name or DELETE.
household.alreadyMember: User is already a member of the household.
household.pendingInvite: There is already a pending invitation to this email address.
household.lastOwner: There must be at least one owner in the household.
household.inviteEmailMismatch: Log in with the same email address the invitation was sent to.
household.notMember: You are not a member of this pantry.

validation.deleteConfirm: Type the household name or DELETE to confirm

api.emailNotVerified: Verify your email address before using the API.
api.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in a moment.
api.openAiNotConfigured: AI service is not available right now. Try again later.
api.openAiUnauthorized: AI service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
api.openAiRateLimit: AI service is busy right now. Wait a moment and try again.
api.openAiMonthlyBudget: The AI service has reached its monthly cap. Try again next month or contact support.
api.openAiRequestFailed: Could not get a response from the AI service. Try again in a moment.
api.openAiNetworkError: Could not reach the AI service. Check your connection and try again.
api.openAiUnreadableResponse: Could not read the AI service response. Try again.
api.openAiEmptyResponse: The AI service returned an empty response. Try again.
api.openAiInvalidJson: Could not parse the AI service response. Try again.
api.productImageNotImage: The file must be an image.
api.productImageUnexpected: Could not read the product from the image. Try again.
api.suggestionsFailed: Could not create shopping suggestions from the AI response. Try again.
api.insightsEmpty: You have no items registered yet.
api.insightsSummary: Here are your latest inventory tips.
api.insightsParse: Could not parse AI response. Try again in a moment.
api.insightsAddItems: Add items in fridge, freezer or cupboard to get smart tips.
api.productImageParse: Could not parse product details from the image. Try a clearer label.
api.receiptUnsupported: Unsupported file type. Use PDF or an image (JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC).
api.photoRoundInvalidZone: Invalid zone. Choose fridge, freezer or cupboard.
api.receiptPdfScanned: This PDF looks like a scan without readable text. Upload a screenshot or photograph the receipt instead.
api.receiptPdfExtractFailed: Could not read the PDF. Try downloading it again or upload an image instead.
api.receiptParseStatus: Could not read the receipt ({status}). Try a clearer file.
api.receiptAiFailed: Could not parse the AI response.
api.receiptNoItems: No items found on the receipt. Try a sharper photo, another PDF, or another angle.
api.aiRateLimitAiScan: You've used all {limit} AI scans this month on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro or wait until next month.
api.aiRateLimitReceiptPdf: You've used all {limit} receipt PDF parses this month on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro or wait until next month.
api.aiRateLimitSmartFill: You've used all {limit} smart fill runs this week on the Free plan. Upgrade to Pro or wait until next week.

actionToast.autoExpiredClearedRemaining: {remaining} left in the pantry — nice work

news.title: News
news.subtitle: What's new in Skaffu — step by step forward
news.lead: Follow the trail of new features and improvements. We keep building so your pantry feels easier every week.
news.metaDescription: Latest news and updates in Skaffu — new features for scanning, recipes, onboarding and more.

launch.title: Skaffu is here
launch.body: The first version of Skaffu — pantry, shopping list and smart tools in one app.
launch.detail: With v1.0 you can track fridge, freezer and cupboard, plan shopping and get started quickly with photo, barcode or receipt. More news will appear here soon.

inventoryTable.title: Clearer pantry overview
inventoryTable.body: Sort, filter and manage items in a compact table — perfect when your stock grows and you want everything at a glance.

scanUx.title: Faster capture with photo and receipt
scanUx.body: Improved scan hub with a clearer flow — photo, barcode or receipt without losing your place.

recipeModal.title: Recipe ideas that feel ready
recipeModal.body: New recipe view with steps, portions and ingredients — pick the right dish from what you already have at home.

onboarding.title: Get started with a smile
onboarding.body: A shorter guide from welcome to your first items — with animations that celebrate your start.

pushFix.title: Notifications that actually work
pushFix.body: Reliable browser notification toggles in settings — expiring items and shopping reminders reach you on time.

proUpgrade.bannerLead: Unlimited AI, receipt PDF and more household members.
proUpgrade.cardLead: Uncapped AI, receipt PDF and more people in your household.

rapport.metaDescription: Anonymised monthly food waste insights from Swedish Skaffu households.
rapport.title: How Swedish households waste food — {month}
rapport.lead: Aggregated, anonymised data from Skaffu households marking expired and discarded items.
rapport.betaDisclaimer: Beta cohort: numbers reflect a growing user base and should be read as early signals, not official statistics.
rapport.insufficientCohort: We publish detailed insights once at least ten households contribute anonymously during the month.
rapport.chartLead: Expired or discarded items marked per weekday.
rapport.ctaTitle: Want to waste less at home?
rapport.ctaLead: Skaffu helps households see what's expiring and plan the week in time.

expiringShare.publicLead: A neighbour or friend shared this list from their pantry.
expiringShare.publicGdprNote: The list shows item names and expiry dates only — no addresses or contact details. The link expires automatically.
